svg.text: Seeing the Symphony — Data Model UML Class Diagram
title, composer, opus, movement, year : string
* per ScoreSection · 1 = stable key · N = modulating
No color_hex — UI maps circle_of_fifths_pos to hue
Populated by Collision Resolver pre-pass; empty at parse time
ERROR = blocks · WARNING = proceed with flag · SUGGESTION = draw attention
Composition — ScoreData owns the target collection
FK Reference — NoteObject references target by id
All arrows routed along named corridors — no diagonal crossings through boxes.
